# Level 2 — The Castle Threshold
# A castle great hall. Fight through two spike pits,
# climb three staggered platforms via stair sections,
# defeat enemies on each platform, reach the Vow Stone.
# 42 cols x 22 rows | TILE_SIZE = 32px
#
# Token key:
#   0=air  1=ground  2=platform  T=spike  S=stair
#   W=side_wall  B=back_wall_brick  N=merlon
#   G=window  L=lion_column  C=ceiling  A=arch  D=damaged_brick
#   P=player  E=enemy  V=vow_stone
